---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new eval, blueprint, slash command, or section in the skill.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is missing or weak today? Link to an eval, a section in `SKILL.md`, or a reference file.

## Proposed change

A short description of what you would add or change. If it is a new eval, paste the prompt and expected output. If it is a new section, sketch the outline.

## Why this helps

Who benefits and how. One sentence is fine.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh, and why is this one better?
